calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Set For Trial On Feb-18-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 220

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Edmund T. Wang of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office T: 415.554.3857;
Austin Wilson (witness for Appellant); Winnie Guidry Respondent in pro per t: 415.467.4415; no other appearances.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Winnie Guidry Respodent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is introduce:

Exhibit A - receipt for replacement gate.

Austin Wilson (witness for Appellant) testifies on behalf of the City and County of San Francisco. The Following evidence is introduce:

Exhibit 1: Plaintiff's claim form;
Exhibit 2: Plaintiff's Denial letter;
Exhibit 3: SFPD Incident report;
Exhibit 4: Scene Photos; and
Exhibit 5: Copy of Penal Code 844.

At the conclusion of the hearing. The Court orders the matter submitted and finds for Appellant City and County of San Francisco, Previous Judgment (12/10/19) is reversed. Proceedings not reported; Judge: Kathleen Kelly; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D220).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Continued To Feb-18-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Continued To Feb-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Judgment Entered
